// src/controllers/StudyMethodController.tsx
import StudyMethodService from'../services/StudyMethodService';/** Matches `loadMethods({ search, category })` and `StudyMethodService.getAllMethods`. */const StudyMethodController={async loadMethods(filters,setMethods,setLoading,toast){setLoading(true);try{const data=await StudyMethodService.getAllMethods(filters);setMethods(data);}catch(_unused){toast.error('Erro ao carregar métodos de estudo.');}finally{setLoading(false);}},async handleCreate(formData,userId,setMethods,closeModal,toast){try{const newMethod=await StudyMethodService.createMethod(formData,userId);setMethods(prev=>[newMethod,...prev]);toast.success('Método criado com sucesso!');closeModal();}catch(error){const message=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Erro ao criar método.';toast.error(message);}},async handleUpdate(id,formData,setMethods,closeModal,toast){try{const updated=await StudyMethodService.updateMethod(id,formData);setMethods(prev=>prev.map(m=>m.id===id?updated:m));toast.success('Método atualizado!');closeModal();}catch(error){const message=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Erro ao atualizar método.';toast.error(message);}},async handleDelete(id,setMethods,toast){try{await StudyMethodService.deleteMethod(id);setMethods(prev=>prev.filter(m=>m.id!==id));toast.success('Método removido.');}catch(error){const message=error instanceof Error?error.message:'Erro ao remover método.';toast.error(message);}},getCategories(){return StudyMethodService.getCategories();},getCategoryLabel(value){return StudyMethodService.getCategoryLabel(value);}};export default StudyMethodController;
